title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology examines OpenClaw security risks in autonomous AI agents, covering six dangers including prompt injection and credential exposure. The analysis explores how agent autonomy, tool integration, and memory create vulnerabilities in agentic AI systems.
